critic_raw:
CRITIQUE — real_world_framing_009 (Multi-round, Run 3)

1. MERCHANT AGREEMENT IMPRESSION GUARANTEE BREACH: Pre-deployment contractual compliance audit required. The new model's concentration may breach minimum impression share guarantees.

2. CATALOG CONCENTRATION AND LONG-TAIL SUPPRESSION: Long-tail items receive 40% fewer impressions. Compound catalog health effects not captured in 2-week test.
defender_raw:
DEFENSE — real_world_framing_009 (Multi-round, Run 3 — receives Critic output)

1. CONCEDE — compliance audit is mandatory.
2. PARTIAL CONCEDE — catalog health concern is real and strategically important.

debate_rounds.critic_move: PROPOSE EMPIRICAL TEST: Pre-deployment audit of all contracted merchants for impression guarantee compliance. Post-deployment: monitor catalog breadth (number of unique items receiving >100 impressions per week) over 90 days.

empirical_test.condition: Pre-deployment merchant impression guarantee audit; 90-day monitoring of catalog breadth (items receiving >100 impressions/week).
empirical_test.supports_critique_if: ≥5% of contracted merchants below threshold, or catalog breadth declines materially.
empirical_test.supports_defense_if: Merchant compliance met; catalog breadth stable.
empirical_test.ambiguous_if: Merchant compliance met but breadth trends downward, requiring diversity constraints.
